## Sign Up

<!-- https://forms.gle/uqqJvR4VhM1YuKCR8 -->

### Participants

<!-- Registration to participate in DataFest 2026 @ Duke is not yet open. Please check back soon! -->

<!-- :::callout-important -->
<!-- **Registration for DataFest 2025 has closed. The event is at capacity.** -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- If you'd like to be placed on a waitlist in the event of no-shows, please contact [Prof. Alexander Fisher](mailto:aaf29@duke.edu). -->

<!-- Register with or without a team below. Regardless of the option you choose, you will automatically be placed on the Duke DataFest mailing list to receive updates and announcements. -->

<!-- :::callout-note -->
<!-- **The registration deadline is 11:59PM March 9, 2026. Seats are limited, so sign up before it's too late!** -->
<!-- ::: -->

**Option 1: Team Registration**

<a href="https://forms.gle/6dztmxV71zoCC8zH6" class="btn btn-primary">
  Click here to sign up as a team of 2 to 5 students.
</a>

**Option 2: Individual Registration**

<!-- This registration option will open soon. -->

If you do not have a team, 

<a href="https://forms.gle/ubJx47rN5wwz998m9" class="btn btn-primary">
  Click here  to leave us your information so that you can be matched with others.
</a>

### Consultants

<!-- Check back soon! -->

<!-- Consultant sign-ups have closed. -->

<a href="https://forms.gle/CWgToPWv3Hah8Y5J9" class="btn btn-primary">
Click here to let us know your availability if you would like to serve as a consultant during the event.
</a>

::: callout-important

The registration **deadline is 11:59PM March 9, 2026.**

:::

### Questions?

Send an email to [Dr. Alexander Fisher](mailto:aaf29@duke.edu) if you would like to update your registration status, or have any questions about your registration.
